name: RCSG Governance Ontology
description: Risk, Compliance, Security & Governance ontology following OAA v6 patterns. Provides a cross-cutting governance layer that aggregates findings from ALZ, O365, PP, and TP audit workstreams into a unified risk and compliance posture.

oaa:entities.name: RiskRegister
oaa:entities.description: Enterprise risk register aggregating risks across all platforms and audit workstreams

oaa:properties.name: scope
oaa:properties.description: Platform scope (ALZ, O365, PP, TP, Cross-Platform)

oaa:properties.name: riskAppetite
oaa:properties.description: Defined risk appetite level (Low, Medium, High)

oaa:properties.name: lastReviewDate
oaa:properties.description: Date of last risk register review

oaa:entities.name: RiskFinding
oaa:entities.description: Individual risk finding from an audit workstream, linked to compliance controls and threat scenarios

oaa:properties.name: sourceAudit
oaa:properties.description: Source audit workstream (alz-ss-v1, o365-ss-v1, pp-ds-v1, tp-as-v1)

oaa:properties.name: severity
oaa:properties.description: Severity rating (Critical, High, Medium, Low, Info)

oaa:properties.name: status
oaa:properties.description: Finding status (Open, In Progress, Mitigated, Accepted, Closed)

oaa:properties.name: wafPillar
oaa:properties.description: WAF pillar alignment (Security, Reliability, Cost, Performance, Operations)

oaa:properties.name: evidenceRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to supporting evidence (KQL query, Graph API result)

oaa:properties.name: complianceControlRef
oaa:properties.description: Linked compliance control ID (MCSB, NIST, ISO)

oaa:entities.name: ThreatScenario
oaa:entities.description: Threat scenario modelled using STRIDE/DREAD methodology aligned to MITRE ATT&CK

oaa:properties.name: strideCategory
oaa:properties.description: STRIDE classification (Spoofing, Tampering, Repudiation, Info Disclosure, DoS, Elevation)

oaa:properties.name: mitreTactic
oaa:properties.description: MITRE ATT&CK tactic (Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, etc.)

oaa:entities.name: ComplianceObligation
oaa:entities.description: Regulatory or framework compliance obligation with control mapping

oaa:properties.name: framework
oaa:properties.description: Source framework (MCSB, NIST, ISO, FCA, PRA, DORA, GDPR, Lloyd's)

oaa:properties.name: complianceStatus
oaa:properties.description: Current status (Compliant, Partial, Non-Compliant, Not Assessed)

oaa:entities.name: GovernancePolicy
oaa:entities.description: Internal governance policy with lifecycle management and compliance linkage

oaa:properties.name: status
oaa:properties.description: Lifecycle status (Draft, Active, Under Review, Superseded, Retired)

oaa:entities.name: AIGovernanceControl
oaa:entities.description: AI-specific governance control for UK AI, EU AI Act, USA AI, and OWASP LLM Top 10 compliance

oaa:properties.name: regulatorySource
oaa:properties.description: Source regulation (UK AI Regulation, EU AI Act, OWASP LLM Top 10)

oaa:properties.name: riskClassification
oaa:properties.description: AI Act risk classification (Unacceptable, High, Limited, Minimal)

oaa:properties.name: applicableInitiative
oaa:properties.description: AI Strategy initiative this applies to (e.g., Virtual Emma, Lead Prediction)

oaa:properties.name: complianceStatus
oaa:properties.description: Assessment status (Compliant, Partial, Non-Compliant, Not Assessed)

oaa:entities.name: RegulatoryBody
oaa:entities.description: Regulatory body or standards organisation relevant to the insurance sector

oaa:properties.name: name
oaa:properties.description: Regulatory body name (FCA, PRA, ICO, Lloyd's, EIOPA)

oaa:entities.name: AssuranceLevel
oaa:entities.description: Assurance level assessment for a platform or domain, tracking posture over time

oaa:properties.name: domain
oaa:properties.description: Assessment domain (Identity, Network, Data, Application, Operations)

oaa:properties.name: maturityLevel
oaa:properties.description: Maturity rating (1-5: Initial, Managed, Defined, Measured, Optimising)

oaa:properties.name: previousLevel
oaa:properties.description: Previous maturity rating for trend analysis

oaa:properties.name: gapAnalysis
oaa:properties.description: Summary of gaps to target level

oaa:entities.name: RemediationPlan
oaa:entities.description: Remediation plan linked to risk findings, with tracking and prioritisation

oaa:properties.name: status
oaa:properties.description: Status (Planned, In Progress, Completed, Deferred, Risk Accepted)

oaa:properties.name: strategicObjective
oaa:properties.description: BSC strategic objective this supports (P3, F4, etc.)

oaa:entities.name: InsuranceComplianceRequirement
oaa:entities.description: Insurance sector-specific compliance requirement from FCA, PRA, Lloyd's, and DORA

oaa:properties.name: regulation
oaa:properties.description: Specific regulation (SYSC 13.9, SS1/21, MS13, DORA, Consumer Duty)

oaa:properties.name: mappedControls
oaa:properties.description: Cross-mapped controls from MCSB, NIST, ISO

oaa:relationships.name: riskRegister_contains_riskFinding
oaa:relationships.description: A risk register contains multiple risk findings

oaa:relationships.name: riskFinding_mappedTo_complianceObligation
oaa:relationships.description: Risk findings map to one or more compliance obligations

oaa:relationships.name: riskFinding_addressedBy_remediationPlan
oaa:relationships.description: Risk findings are addressed by remediation plans

oaa:relationships.name: threatScenario_generates_riskFinding
oaa:relationships.description: Threat scenarios generate risk findings when assessed

oaa:relationships.name: complianceObligation_issuedBy_regulatoryBody
oaa:relationships.description: Compliance obligations are issued by regulatory bodies

oaa:relationships.name: aiGovernanceControl_extends_complianceObligation
oaa:relationships.description: AI governance controls extend general compliance obligations for AI-specific requirements

oaa:relationships.name: assuranceLevel_assessedFor_riskRegister
oaa:relationships.description: Assurance levels are assessed within the context of a risk register

oaa:relationships.name: insuranceRequirement_specialises_complianceObligation
oaa:relationships.description: Insurance requirements specialise general compliance obligations for the insurance sector

oaa:relationships.name: remediationPlan_improves_assuranceLevel
oaa:relationships.description: Completed remediation plans improve the assurance level for a platform/domain

oaa:businessRules.name: BR-RCSG-001
oaa:businessRules.description: All Critical and High severity findings must have an associated remediation plan within 5 business days

oaa:businessRules.name: BR-RCSG-002
oaa:businessRules.description: Compliance obligations from FCA, PRA, and Lloyd's must be reassessed at least quarterly

oaa:businessRules.name: BR-RCSG-003
oaa:businessRules.description: AI initiatives classified as High Risk under EU AI Act must have documented AI governance controls before deployment

oaa:businessRules.name: BR-RCSG-004
oaa:businessRules.description: Governance policies must be reviewed at least annually; security policies at least bi-annually

oaa:businessRules.name: BR-RCSG-005
oaa:businessRules.description: Risk acceptance decisions for findings above Medium severity require CISO or CRO approval

oaa:businessRules.name: BR-RCSG-006
oaa:businessRules.description: Cross-platform risk findings must be aggregated into the enterprise risk register within 48 hours of discovery
